creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
kuriyama    2008-03-25 02:41:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    converters           Makefile 
    converters/p5-JSON1  Makefile 
    converters/p5-JSON   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Repository copy from p5-JSON to p5-JSON1.
  - Mark p5-JSON1 as conflicting with p5-JSON-2.x.
  - Upgrade p5-JSON to 2.07 and mark as conflicting with p5-JSON-1.x.
  - Use CPAN macro, add Test-Simple dependency and improve pkg-plist.
  
  PR:             ports/120596
  Submitted by:   Felippe de Meirelles Motta <lippemail@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.146     +1 -0      ports/converters/Makefile
  1.11      +12 -13    ports/converters/p5-JSON/Makefile
  1.10      +3 -3      ports/converters/p5-JSON/distinfo
  1.8       +4 -10     ports/converters/p5-JSON/pkg-plist
  1.11      +2 -0      ports/converters/p5-JSON1/Makefile
